description: Multi-framework boilerplate for Hive companies (Next.js, Astro, SvelteKit, static)

features.description: Waitlist signup with referral tracking and position display
features.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS waitlist (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid()::text, email TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL, referral_code TEXT UNIQUE, referred_by TEXT, position INTEGER, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now());

features.description: Structured email sequence storage for lifecycle emails (welcome, drip, re-engagement)
features.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS email_sequences (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid()::text, name TEXT NOT NULL, trigger_event TEXT NOT NULL, subject TEXT NOT NULL, body TEXT NOT NULL, delay_hours INTEGER DEFAULT 0, sequence_order INTEGER DEFAULT 0, active BOOLEAN DEFAULT true, variant TEXT DEFAULT 'A', created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now()); CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS email_log (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid()::text, sequence_id TEXT REFERENCES email_sequences(id), recipient TEXT NOT NULL, status TEXT DEFAULT 'sent', opened_at TIMESTAMPTZ, clicked_at TIMESTAMPTZ, sent_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now());

features.description: Resend webhook handler for email open/click/bounce tracking
Stripe webhook for payment processing, customer creation, subscription management
features.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS customers (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid()::text, email TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL, stripe_customer_id TEXT UNIQUE, plan TEXT DEFAULT 'free', status TEXT DEFAULT 'active', created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now());

features.description: llms.txt file for AI crawler discoverability + robots.txt with AI bot allows
JSON-LD structured data (Organization + WebSite) in layout for rich search results
GitHub Actions workflow for Hive Engineer dispatch (build/fix features via Claude)
GitHub Actions workflow for Hive Growth agent (content creation, SEO, blog posts via Claude)
GitHub Actions workflow for Hive Healer (bug fixes on company repo via Claude)
Health check API endpoint for monitoring and smoke tests
Playwright smoke test suite (homepage load, JS errors, health endpoint, stats API)
GitHub Actions workflow that runs smoke tests against Vercel URL after merge to main
Vercel Web Analytics client-side tracking (@vercel/analytics in layout)
Fake-door CTA click tracking for SaaS pricing validation
features.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pricing_clicks (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid()::text, date DATE NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_DATE, tier TEXT NOT NULL, source_path TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '/pricing', created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now());

features.description: Outbound affiliate link click tracking for monetization validation
features.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS affiliate_clicks (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid()::text, date DATE NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_DATE, link_id TEXT NOT NULL, destination_url TEXT, source_path TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '/', created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now());

features.description: Stats API endpoint that reports views, pricing clicks, and affiliate clicks for Hive metrics collection
